data.content: Shipment completed. All implementation commits are on main and pushed to origin. Commit b2de69b9ceae (feature branch) was superseded by commit 0c931afdd46f which is already on main — it replaced the heuristic text-based detail filter with event-type-based filtering (stdout_detail events). No new merge needed; the feature branch's approach was obsoleted by the superior implementation already merged. Tests pass (2152/2152), types clean on main source. Lint has 200k+ pre-existing issues unrelated to this knot.
